subtitle: Chief AI & Data Officer -- Data Strategy | AI Transformation | Social Impact
summary_text: Technology executive with 14 years as Chief Technology Officer at a national nonprofit and 17 years as a technology founder, bringing end-to-end data and AI leadership to mission-driven organizations. Deployed production ML (DataRobot) for credit risk and servicing use cases; led enterprise contact center AI transformation including intelligent routing, AI-assisted coaching, and integrated knowledge bots. Built a structured AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, evaluation flow, and GenAI/agentic capability taxonomy -- adopted by a national consulting firm to guide platform selection and responsible AI governance. Operates across every altitude simultaneously: multiyear technical roadmap one moment, architectural trade-off the next. Distinctive positioning: a nuanced, non-hype view of AI grounded in what actually works in production. Published thinking on AI governance, the AI/automation distinction, and reflexive AI use available at linkedin.com/in/daniel-m-levine.

bullets: Built a structured AI architecture evaluation framework for a national CX consulting firm -- scoring rubric, evaluation flow, and GenAI/agentic capability taxonomy covering enterprise contact center platforms through AI-focused startups; deliverables adopted and in active use to guide platform selection and responsible AI governance.

Designed algorithmic evaluation methodologies to assess generative AI and agentic systems for enterprise contact center and customer service environments, mapping AI capabilities to specific technologies with analysis of integration trade-offs and when to replace native AI tools with specialized offerings.
Provide solution architecture leadership and pre-sales technical guidance to support AI platform evaluation, vendor selection, and executive decision-making on AI adoption strategy.

Appointed as the first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history; led a technology organization of 35+ direct / 75+ extended staff with an IT operating budget exceeding $15M within $30-50M total organizational spend -- reporting to CEO throughout.

Owned end-to-end data function including production ML deployment via DataRobot for credit risk and servicing use cases; built data foundation from DBA/SQL Architect origin through enterprise data warehouse to production ML, with full PCI-DSS and HIPAA compliance maintained across all data assets.

Led enterprise contact center AI transformation -- intelligent call routing, AI-assisted coaching and monitoring, integrated knowledge bots within homegrown ERP, and integration of CC metrics into enterprise reporting -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live of full platform replacement.

Owned product roadmap and strategic prioritization for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM over eight years, directing a 45-50 person delivery org and operating a multi-factor prioritization model (ROI x user satisfaction x efficiency x cross-departmental equity) across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders.

Orchestrated digital transformation delivering 200%+ improvement in SEO and digital acquisition; directed complete rebuild of web properties, multi-platform mobile applications, and embedded operational analytics across the enterprise.

Built highest-retention technology culture in the organization through consensus-based leadership and conflict-competent team design; sustained 10-20% improvement across key IT performance metrics year over year.

Founded and scaled a web development and IT consulting firm over 17 years with full P&L ownership; peak 12 employees, peak revenue $4-5M -- first founder, first salesperson, first architect, and often the last implementer.

Architected and launched a proprietary commercial-grade CMS platform supporting dozens of content-driven client websites; built and scaled multiple independent revenue streams including hosting, web applications, and social media optimization.

projects.title: AI Architecture Evaluation Framework

projects.title: career-ops-dml
projects.desc: Forked and customized an open-source AI job search pipeline -- built on Claude Code -- to run a full executive search: 350+ roles evaluated, 20+ tailored CVs generated. Live infrastructure, not an experiment.
